form.formComment: Last start 9th (FT Fr6) over 2090m at this track, beaten 30 m by Sapphire Gambler (2:38.40) in NR 55 or better on April 3 at $31. The run previous 8th (Fr7) over 2200m at Launceston beaten 65 m by Enjoy Life (2:42.20) in 3yo+ NMT 2 LTW's on January 31 at $20. Better than recent form suggests; great chance to bounce back.
